CONTENT.Club career: Born in Montevideo, Benavídez began his career with hometown side Defensor Sporting, making his first team debut in 2016 at the age of 18. He became a regular starter in 2017, and moved to Argentine Primera División side Independiente.On 1 July 2022, Benavídez signed a two-year contract with Spanish Segunda División team Deportivo Alavés.

SUMMARY: Carlos Nahuel Benavídez Protesoni (born 30 March 1998) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as central midfielder for La Liga club Deportivo Alavés.
